name: Malzahar, Fanatic
text: Kill a friendly unit or gear, :rb_exhaust:: [Action] — [Add] :rb_rune_rainbow::rb_rune_rainbow:. (Use on your turn or in showdowns. Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)
